overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works approved the lowest bid for the 26th Street construction project at $1,279,089.75, approved a change order for the Randolph Street/Cherry Street project totaling $14,436.50, and issued a concrete license to KSK Inc. All items passed unanimously in a brief meeting.

agenda.item: Consideration of March 10th regular Board of Public Works minutes
Open bids for 26th Street construction project
2025 Street Construction Project A - Randolph Street, Cherry Street Change Order 1
2025 Street Construction Project A - Pay Estimate Number 9
Portland cement concrete license for KSK Incorporated

discussions.item: March 10th Board of Public Works Minutes
discussions.body: The minutes from the March 10th regular meeting were approved. A motion was made and seconded, passing unanimously with all in favor.

Seven bids were opened and read aloud. Switlick submitted the lowest bid at $1,279,089.75, narrowly beating Hos at $1,280,877.96. Other bids ranged up to $1,686,708.75 from Earth. A board member noted the bids were 'tight.' A motion to approve Switlick as the winning bidder was made, seconded, and passed unanimously.
This item was postponed as the bid opening deadline was extended. Staff indicated it will come back to a future meeting.

Staff explained four items in the change order totaling $14,436.50: an inside drop on a manhole ($4,856) due to an unrecorded large diameter sanitary service; water main tee installation ($2,317.50) after finding 6-inch pipe instead of expected 8-inch; miscellaneous storm sewer tie-ins ($5,016) at $66 per lineal foot; and geogrid installation ($2,247) for approximately 750 square yards near Thomas Jefferson Elementary due to poor soil conditions. Change Order 2 regarding liquidated damages was not considered pending further discussions. Motion to approve passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Randolph Street/Cherry Street Pay Estimate Number 9
discussions.body: Staff recommended approval of pay estimate number nine for work completed through the end of the year in the amount of $535,114.20. Motion to approve was made, seconded, and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Portland Cement Concrete License - KSK Incorporated
discussions.body: Vinnie confirmed he reviewed the application and everything was in order. A motion to approve the Portland cement concrete license for KSK Inc. was made, seconded, and passed unanimously.

actionItems: Switlick awarded 26th Street construction project contract at $1,279,089.75
North 8th Avenue bid opening postponed to future meeting
Change Order 1 for Randolph/Cherry Street project approved for $14,436.50
Change Order 2 with liquidated damages to return for future consideration
Pay Estimate 9 approved for $535,114.20 for Randolph/Cherry Street project
Portland cement concrete license issued to KSK Incorporated
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting - 3/17/2026 - 3/17/2026
